The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various ailments such as fever and respiratory infections. The bioactive constituents of Martiodendron parvifolium include alkaloids, saponins, and flavonoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
